title: Avionics Cooling Fan Controller System Safety Assessment
content_summary: Draft safety assessment for control logic and electrical interface behavior of the replacement avionics cooling fan controller.

sections.title: Change Overview
sections.content: Replacement of the avionics cooling fan controller with updated control logic and modified electrical interface behavior.

sections.title: Failure Modes
sections.content: Failure mode analysis is incomplete and requires review of controller response under abnormal operating conditions.

sections.title: Safety Impact
sections.content: Potential impacts include degraded cooling response, incorrect fan activation logic, and interface mismatch with existing avionics bay systems.

title: Software Verification Evidence Matrix
content_summary: Verification matrix mapping controller logic requirements to planned test evidence.

sections.title: Functional Requirements
sections.content: Supplier must map controller activation logic, fault handling, and shutdown behavior to verification tests.

sections.title: Test Evidence
sections.content: No software verification test results have been attached yet.

title: Electrical Interface Design Diagram
content_summary: Diagram showing revised controller pinout, power interface, signal behavior, and connection to the avionics bay cooling circuit.

sections.title: Interface Overview
sections.content: Diagram captures power, control, and status signal connections for the replacement controller.

sections.title: Open Concerns
sections.content: Compatibility with existing electrical load profile and abnormal-condition behavior still require certification review.

title: Seat Frame Bracket Stress Analysis
content_summary: Stress analysis draft is blocked because supplier load case data has not been submitted.

sections.title: Load Cases
sections.content: Supplier load case input is missing.

sections.title: Stress Margin Summary
sections.content: Cannot calculate margins until required load cases are provided.
